mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (category_id, user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.category_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt, p.view_count AS viewCount, u.username, c.name AS categoryName FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY
p.id p.title u.username p.view_count c.name p.created_at p.createdAt
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at, c.name, u.username, cm.id AS comment_id, cm.content AS comment_content, cm.created_at AS comment_created_at, cu.username AS comment_user_name FROM posts p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comments cm ON p.id = cm.post_id LEFT JOIN users cu ON cm.user_id = cu.id WHERE p.id = #{id} ORDER BY cm.created_at ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE posts
title = #{post.title},
content = #{post.content},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, post_id, content) VALUES (#{post.userId}, #{id}, #{post.content})
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = #{username};
SELECT c.id, u.username FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id};
